    "Weep holes are missing or blocked at the bottom course of the masonry wall."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Clear blocked weep holes or drill/install new weep holes at the bottom course to ensure proper drainage.",
    "Verify that flashing is undamaged and properly routed to the exterior before clearing blockages."
  ],
  "rationale": "Weep holes are critical for draining moisture that accumulates on the flashing. Missing or blocked weep holes violate TMS 402 and BIA technical notes, risking water accumulation, freeze-thaw damage, and structural degradation.",
